scripts.build: node --import tsx scripts/clean-package-dists.ts && tsc -b && node --import tsx scripts/build-core-browser.ts && node --import tsx scripts/build-demo.ts && pnpm site:build && node --import tsx scripts/check-core-package-boundary.ts
scripts.site:build: cd site && react-router build && cd .. && node --import tsx scripts/check-site-prerender.ts && node --import tsx scripts/copy-site-demo.ts
scripts.site:typecheck: cd site && react-router typegen && tsc --noEmit --pretty false -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false && tsc --noEmit --pretty false -p tests/typecheck/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --pretty false -p examples/demo/tsconfig.json && pnpm site:typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm preflight && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm bundle:size && pnpm build && pnpm test:site && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm run audit:prod && pnpm run licenses
